prestazioni: L87 6.2L V8 (EcoTec3) forced induction via Edelbrock E-Force TVS2650 supercharger kit (12psi, 650+ hp, 600+ lb-ft) with integrated water-methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit) and custom dyno-tuned HP Tuners VCM Suite calibration (GM-specific OS 12688088)

Bilstein B8 8112 series front coilovers (2.5" lift, 46mm digressive pistons) paired with B8 6112 rear shocks (remote reservoirs, 24-way adjustable damping) and Hellwig 77180 sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) for chassis rigidity

American Racing Headers 1-7/8" long-tube headers (304 stainless, merge collectors) with MagnaFlow 19536 cat-back exhaust (dual 4" polished tips, 304SS, aggressive N1 race mufflers) and Borla 20258 catalytic converters (200-cell, high-flow)
estetica: Rigid Industries SR-Series 42" LED light bar (amber fog pattern, 50,000 lumen) mounted via custom Fab Fours front bumper (winch-ready, 3/16" steel, AT4-specific cutouts) with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch (synthetic rope, 12,000 lb capacity)

Method MR701 Bead Grip wheels (20x10, +18mm offset, matte black) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler tires (35x12.50R20, 3-ply sidewall) with Bushwacker 64-81-020-00 fender flares (pocket-style, extended 2.5")

RK Sport AT4-specific carbon fiber hood (OEM-style latches, 50% weight reduction) with custom PPG Matte Military Green wrap (3M 2080-122) and Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED side markers (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals)
